---
title: "Previous Updates"
subtitle: ""
format: html
listing:
  - id: "2025"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2025.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
  - id: "2024"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2024.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
  - id: "2023"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2023.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
  - id: "2022"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2022.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
  - id: "2021"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2021.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
  - id: "2020"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2020.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
  - id: "2019"
    contents: "mhw_prev_2019.yml"
    fields: [title,date,description]
---

## 2025

:::{#2025}
:::

## 2024

:::{#2024}
:::

## 2023

:::{#2023}
:::

## 2022

:::{#2022}
:::

## 2021

:::{#2021}
:::

## 2020

:::{#2020}
:::

## 2019

:::{#2019}
:::
